summary: Guided Umami and Plausible migration with dry runs, provenance, duplicate protection, and an improved first-run path.
highlights: Discovers and classifies Zo Space routes, Sites, services, aliases, and external production surfaces
Connects changes and fixes to evidence-backed follow-up outcomes
Generates a deterministic weekly owner brief without an LLM
Preserves the embedded SQLite database and opt-in Pulse configuration during updates
Imports Umami event history or Plausible aggregate history without inventing sessions
